description: uinames.com is a simple fake-name generator for design mockups and test data. Its open-source project publishes regional name datasets and a small web/API interface for generating random names and optional extra profile data.
summary: uinames.com exposes one public HTTP JSON/JSONP API at `https://uinames.com/api/` with no documented authentication; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
